title: Kanbus clock CLI rotation flag
description: Add simple CLI option to rotate display 180 degrees for kanbus_clock.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Implementing simple CLI rotation for kanbus_clock (180-degree upside-down toggle) and wiring to Pixoo Device/SetScreenRotationAngle at startup.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Implemented: added --upside-down / --right-side-up flags in kanbus_clock, wired to Pixoo Device/SetScreenRotationAngle at startup (mode 2 for upside-down, mode 0 for right-side-up). Verified py_compile and pytest (63 passing).
